title: Copart 2025 Form 10-K
note: Fiscal 2025 filing used for Copart's business model, seller and buyer context, service revenue, vehicle sales, operating income, segment data, and risk factors.

title: Online Car Auctions | Repairable & Used Cars - Copart
note: Primary product page for Copart's online auctions, member workflow, vehicle categories, inventory scale, and buyer-facing marketplace positioning.

title: Copart (CPRT) Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization reference used for the June 2026 marketCap input.

title: Copart (CPRT) P/E Ratio
note: Trailing P/E ratio reference used for the peRatio input.

title: OpenProcurement
note: Open-source procurement and auction toolkit reference used as an enabling source for transparent auction infrastructure.

title: OpenProcurement Auction GitHub Repository
note: Public Apache-2.0 auction module repository used as the direct open auction software alternative reference.

title: OpenTimestamps
note: Bitcoin-backed timestamping proof standard used for tamper-evident lot, title, custody, and part-provenance concepts.
